titleStmt.title: SII 35.18: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 18. (A.R. No. 83 of 1951-52.) HIRĒKERŪR, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. I) set up near Tōṭada Viraṇṇa temple outside the village.

This inscription referring itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva is dated Śaka 983, Śārvari, Bhādrapada, Amāvāsya, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1060 August, 28. But the Cyclic year Śārvari occurred 982 not 983 as cited in the record.

It records a gift of income from perjuṁka made to certain prominent local residents (names specified) for the upkeep of the big tank of Piriya-Keṟyūr by Daṇḍanāyaka Guṇḍamayya. The king's general bears the titles, Narmadā-nady-ubhaya-taṭa-rājahaṁsa (a swan of the two banks of Narmadā), Māḷava-dhūmakētu (fire to the Māḷavas), Maṇḍavokōṭ-ōllaṁ-ghana (capture of the Maṇḍava fort), Dhārānagara-kutūhala (a curiosity to the inhabitants of Dhārā) and Mummaṇijaḷadhibaḍavānaḷa (submarine fire to the sea of Mummaṇi). Kāśyapa Mādhava wrote the record and Nāgavarman of Huligeṟe engraved it. It is Published in Karnataka inscriptions Vol. IV, No. 26.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūla
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.] haṁceyara mādhavayya śrī śivadēvapādābjabhriṁgana likhita
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja para
mēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyabharaṇaṁ śrī matrai
ḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi prava¨rddhamānamācaṁ
drā¨rkkatāraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda ma
hāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍa daṇḍanāyaka vairibhayadāyaka maṁtri
māṇikyaṁ nīticāṇākyaṁ satyarādhēyaṁ śaucāṁjanēya
vibudhajanavanajavana mā¨rttaṇḍa nerevoḍe gaṇḍa na¨rmmadānadyubha
yataṭarājahaṁsa māḷavadhūmakētu maṇḍavakōṭōlluṁghana
dhārānagarakutūhaḷa mummuni jaḷadhi baḍavānaḷaṁ śrīma
traiḷōkyamalladēva pādābjabhriṁga sāhasōttuṁga nāmā
di samasta praśasti sahita śrīmanmaneve¨rggaḍe daṇḍanā
yaka guṇḍamayyaṁgaḷ sakava¨rṣa 983 neya śā¨rvvari saṁvatsa
rada bhādrapadadamavāsye sōmavāradaṁdu rājadhāni kalyāṇa
di¨rkkevīḍinoḷagrahāra piriyakeṟeyūra piriyake
ṟegāyūra pannāyada kuḷiya pe¨rjuṁkamanalliya pa¨rvva
¨rvvar vāsudēva dvivēdi bhaṭṭar . janniyabbeya biṭṭayya . ka
ppaḍi sōvayya biṭṭayyanīśvarayya . Arasabbeya bāsa
yya dēmayyana tikayyaniṁtiva¨rgge dhārāpū¨rvvaka māḍi ko
ṭṭa dha¨rmamanārō¨rvvar pratipālisidar kurukṣētra vāra
ṇāsi prayāge A¨rgghyatī¨rtthaviṁtī puṇyasthānagaḷal sā
sira kavileya vēdapāraga¨rgge koṭṭa puṇyamaneydu
varī dha¨rmavanaḷidavanā tī¨rtthasthānadalsāsira kavileyu
ma sāsira vēdapāragarumanaḷida pātaḥnakku ©
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭiṁ va¨rṣa sa
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmasētu
nṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyo bhavadbhiḥ sa¨rvānētāvbhāginaḥ pā¨rtthivē
ndrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
tadgrāmajanmā tilakaḥ kulasya dēvadvijāgrya¨rccana
datta citta rrāmapayuktyā likhitaṁ vyadhattassadakṣara
kāśyapa mādhavākhyaḥ . śrī puligeṟe nāgava
¨rmana likhita
Digital edition of SII 35.18 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
